steps.title: Spot the goal-to-action flow
steps.content: The first sentence establishes Amber Joy's goal: avoid harmful dyes. The second sentence describes her resulting action: experimenting with natural dyes. The transition must show that the action stems from this motivation.

steps.title: Apply this causation to the choices
steps.content: “With this in mind” signals that the preceding goal is the basis for the action that follows. The other three signal false relationships: contradiction (“Nevertheless”), conclusion (“To sum up”), and correction (“In actuality”). That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
